name: Division of Computing & Information Systems
description: A department dedicated to the technical rigors of software architecture, network infrastructure, and digital systems management.

highlights.title: IT Colloquium: 2025 Awarding
highlights.text: The academic community concluded the annual IT Week with a formal recognition of technical skill and competitive merit, setting a new benchmark for student innovation.

highlights.title: Avante-Garde Design Showcase
highlights.text: The department hosted a technical fashion integration, highlighting the intersection of modern aesthetics and futuristic design concepts.

name: Department of Criminological Research
description: Professional training for law enforcement, focusing on forensic methodology, public safety protocols, and justice administration.

highlights.title: Justice Symposium 2024
highlights.text: An intensive forensic and investigative seminar series provided students with deep insights into the contemporary pillars of the criminal justice system.

name: Division of Corporate & Fiscal Management
description: Fostering strategic leadership through financial literacy, market analysis, and entrepreneurial governance.

highlights.title: Performance Arts Distinction 2026
highlights.text: The department secured first place in the annual lip-sync competition, showcasing student creativity through a meticulously choreographed thematic performance.

name: Institute of Hospitality & Global Tourism
description: Standard-driven education in international hotel operations, culinary management, and tourism hospitality.
achievements: Faculty Leadership: CHEDRO6 Council Vice Presidency
Principal Catering Partner for ALCOR VI Sessions

highlights.title: Industry Practicum: Park Inn Radisson
highlights.text: Undergraduate students participated in a high-level industry immersion in Iloilo City, aligning academic theory with international corporate standards.

name: School of Pedagogy & Teacher Education
description: Developing future educators through ethical pedagogical practices and instructional mastery.
achievements: Exemplary LET Passing Rate for First-Time Candidates

highlights.title: Athletic Merit: Hinampang 2026
highlights.text: The department demonstrated unified athletic and school spirit at the Passi Arena, reinforcing the community's commitment to physical and moral excellence.
